# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.6
> Upcoming release · Ships with [SkiaSharp 4.147.0](../4.147.0.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.6 ships 9 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia to milestone 147** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3702](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3702))
- **Variable font support to SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3703](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3703))

## API Surface

- **Color font palette support and improve variable font robustness** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3742](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3742))
- **HBColor struct for proper hb_color_t representation** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4000](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4000))

## Bug Fixes

- **TreatWarningsAsErrors in binding/ and fix all warnings** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3752](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3752))
- **Skottie package downgrade NU1605 in Uno gallery** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3785](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3785))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic native assets support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **X64 and arm64 native build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620))
- **Drop native builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten versions** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4022](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4022))

## Preview 3 (May 24, 2026)

Preview 3 carried Drop native builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten versions; HBColor struct for proper hb_color_t representation; TreatWarningsAsErrors in binding/ and fix all warnings.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.2.1...v4.147.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (May 6, 2026)

Preview 2 carried Skottie package downgrade NU1605 in Uno gallery.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.1.1...v4.147.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (April 28, 2026)

Preview 1 carried skia to milestone 147; color font palette support and improve variable font robustness; variable font support to SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp; Linux Bionic native assets support; x64 and arm64 native build support.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.4...v4.147.0-preview.1.1)
